In conclusion, respecting both AI and human contributions requires a balanced approach. Emphasizing AI capabilities can highlight its strengths, while deferring to human experience can validate their expertise. By finding the right balance, I can ensure that both are acknowledged fairly, maintaining trust and respect in the process.
